title: SanityBandPolicy.FPS.v1
description: Tier-specific sanity bands and budget caps for FPS envelopes, defining floor, comfort, and dissociation thresholds and maximum allowed band occupancy fractions.

policyId.description: Stable ID for this sanity band policy, e.g. sanity-bands.fps.standard.v1.

tierId.description: Tier this band policy applies to.

sanityFloor.description: Hard lower bound for sanity, sanity_min^(tier). Must match or exceed the envelope policy sanityFloor.

sanityComfort.description: Soft lower comfort bound within the safe set S. Below this, sanity is considered 'low band'.

sanityHigh.description: Upper dissociation threshold. Above this, sanity is considered 'high band'.

maxLowBandFraction.description: Maximum allowed fraction of session time spent in low band: T_low / T.

maxLongestLowRunFraction.description: Maximum allowed fraction of session for the longest contiguous low-band run: L_low / T.

maxHighBandFraction.description: Maximum allowed fraction of session time spent in high band: T_high / T.

maxBandTransitions.description: Optional cap on the number of band transitions (low/comfort/high) to avoid extreme oscillation patterns.
